name: acms-zoho
description: Zoho API と連携し、お問い合わせフォームなどで送信された内容をZoho CRMに登録します。

scripts.package: pnpm run setup && pnpm run build:app
scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run package && pnpm run release:commit
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run package && pnpm run release:commit
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run package && pnpm run release:commit

author: appleple
